text:
Market today: The mood is jumpy, driven by currency fears and IBM's earnings shocker. This impacts your tech-heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -30.59% - it's leveraged and decaying. SPAL is also a concern at -36.78% for the same reasons. CRWD is holding steady at +17.16%.

Watch: Keep an eye on IBM's fallout and any ripple effects on tech sentiment. Also, watch the Japanese yen.

Bottom line: Your leveraged names need close attention, especially with market uncertainty.
plays: SOXL: TRIM - Leveraged decay is brutal. Consider reducing exposure.
SPAL: TRIM - Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF is a high-risk decay play.
AMD: Consider entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95 if pattern confirms.
